items.name: CAPTURE_BPP
items.doc: Bits per pixel used when capturing window bitmaps (BGRA = 32 bpp).

items.name: CAPTURE_BYTES_PER_PIXEL
items.doc: Bytes per pixel for BGRA capture buffers.

items.name: RGB_CHANNELS
items.doc: Number of colour channels in an RGB image (R, G, B).

items.name: CENTER_DIVISOR
items.doc: Divisor used to compute the centre offset of a template region.

items.name: WINDOW_TITLE_BUF
items.doc: Maximum number of UTF-16 code units for a window title buffer.

items.name: TITLE_BUF_PADDING
items.doc: Extra UTF-16 code units added to GetWindowTextLengthW result (null terminator + guard byte).

items.name: BGRA_R_IDX
items.doc: Byte index of the Red channel within a BGRA pixel (index 2).

items.name: BGRA_G_IDX
items.doc: Byte index of the Green channel within a BGRA pixel (index 1).

items.name: BGRA_B_IDX
items.doc: Byte index of the Blue channel within a BGRA pixel (index 0).

items.name: FOCUS_DELAY_MS
items.doc: Milliseconds to wait after SetForegroundWindow before sending input.

items.name: PW_FULL_CONTENT
items.doc: PrintWindow flag: PW_RENDERFULLCONTENT  --  captures background/hidden windows.

items.name: KEY_EVENT_DELAY_MS
items.doc: Milliseconds to sleep between key-down and key-up messages.

items.name: WM_CHAR_ID
items.doc: WM_CHAR message ID.

items.name: WM_KEYDOWN_ID
items.doc: WM_KEYDOWN message ID.

items.name: WM_KEYUP_ID
items.doc: WM_KEYUP message ID.

items.name: WM_LBUTTONDOWN_ID
items.doc: WM_LBUTTONDOWN message ID.

items.name: WM_LBUTTONUP_ID
items.doc: WM_LBUTTONUP message ID.

items.name: WM_RBUTTONDOWN_ID
items.doc: WM_RBUTTONDOWN message ID.

items.name: WM_RBUTTONUP_ID
items.doc: WM_RBUTTONUP message ID.

items.name: MOUSE_LPARAM_Y_SHIFT
items.doc: Shift for y-coordinate in LPARAM for mouse messages.

items.name: MOUSE_COORD_MASK
items.doc: Mask for coordinate packing in mouse LPARAM.

items.name: CLASS_NAME_BUF
items.doc: Buffer size for GetClassNameW result.

items.name: LPARAM_SCANCODE_SHIFT
items.doc: Bit position of scan code in WM_KEYDOWN/UP lParam.

items.name: LPARAM_PREV_STATE_BIT
items.doc: Bit position of previous key state in WM_KEYDOWN/UP lParam.

items.name: LPARAM_TRANSITION_BIT
items.doc: Bit position of transition state in WM_KEYUP lParam.

items.name: EM_SETSEL_ID
items.doc: EM_SETSEL message ID  --  selects text range in an edit control.

items.name: WM_COPY_ID
items.doc: WM_COPY message ID  --  copies selection to clipboard.

items.name: WM_CUT_ID
items.doc: WM_CUT message ID  --  cuts selection to clipboard.

items.name: WM_PASTE_ID
items.doc: WM_PASTE message ID  --  pastes clipboard into control.

items.name: SCREENSHOT_INTERVAL_MS
items.doc: Milliseconds to sleep between sequential screenshots for near-live capture.

items.name: BURST_DEFAULT_COUNT
items.doc: Default number of frames in a screenshot burst.

items.name: BURST_MAX_COUNT
items.doc: Maximum number of frames in a screenshot burst.

items.name: BURST_CONTENT_PER_FRAME
items.doc: Content entries per frame in burst result (image + text label).

items.name: EXPECTED_TOOL_COUNT
items.doc: Total number of MCP tools registered by the server.

items.name: CROP_FIND_MAX_DIM
items.doc: Maximum haystack dimension for NCC search in crop-then-find tests (debug-safe).

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_R_X
items.doc: Test pixel pattern coefficients for deterministic image generation.

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_R_Y
items.doc: Test pixel pattern coefficient for R channel Y component.

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_R_MOD
items.doc: Test pixel pattern modulus for R channel.

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_G_X
items.doc: Test pixel pattern coefficient for G channel X component.

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_G_Y
items.doc: Test pixel pattern coefficient for G channel Y component.

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_G_OFF
items.doc: Test pixel pattern offset for G channel.

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_G_MOD
items.doc: Test pixel pattern modulus for G channel.

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_B_X
items.doc: Test pixel pattern coefficient for B channel X component.

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_B_Y
items.doc: Test pixel pattern coefficient for B channel Y component.

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_B_OFF
items.doc: Test pixel pattern offset for B channel.

items.name: TEST_PIXEL_B_MOD
items.doc: Test pixel pattern modulus for B channel.
